default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between AfterShoot and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, workflow optimization, and conversion improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New workflow improvements (keyword approval, outline reviews) should streamline content production](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Focus on balancing photographer-specific content with broader topics that can attract relevant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [TOFU content has been converting well; need to strategically integrate product mentions](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Team to analyze conversion data to inform future content strategy and topic selection](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Updates

  - [Wedding dress photo article ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Backlighting article awaiting photographer review](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Several articles in editing phase, aiming to publish two this week](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [New batch of keyword ideas (20-30) being developed for approval](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Discussing balance between photographer-focused content and broader topics](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Proposal for location-based wedding/engagement shoot content series](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Potential to create downloadable infographics or checklists as value-adds](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [Team exploring ways to streamline review process and increase publishing velocity](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Suggestion to establish a more structured editing schedule to reduce back-and-forth](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [Focus on incorporating common feedback into initial drafting process](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)

### Conversion Analysis and Improvement

  - [AfterShoot seeing good conversions from TOFU (top of funnel) content](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [Team to analyze Posthog data to identify patterns in converting content](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Discussion on strategically integrating product mentions in broader topics](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Introduction of Tiandra as new content writer, replacing Nico](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Clarification on roles and communication processes for content reviews](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share SEO checklist for images with David](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Send Posthog conversion data export to Jakub for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Review and discuss the programmatic SEO page proposal with Rasheed](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Implement more structured editing schedule to streamline content production](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [Explore creation of infographics/downloadables for high-value content](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [Continue developing and approving new keyword ideas for content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/sNia-uJMycvk1shXvmLCx9zzmGS3szqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
